name: Phase 05F Schema Extension
description:

Do NOT explain.

Return only production-ready Prisma schema code.

goal.answer: Extend prisma/schema.prisma with Phase 05F models and enums while remaining compatible with phases 05A-05E and passing Prisma format/validate.

criteria.answer:
schema.prisma contains new models SearchHistory, SavedSearch, Notification, NotificationPreference, ActivityFeed, Recommendation, WrappedYear, WrappedStat, AnalyticsSnapshot, DeviceSession
schema.prisma contains new enums NotificationType, ActivityType, RecommendationReason, VisibilityLevel
No existing 05A-05E models or enums are renamed or removed
Prisma format command exits 0
Prisma validate command exits 0

constraints.answer: Do not regenerate or rename previous models/enums from phases 05A-05E, Do not modify previous schema except for required Prisma back-relation arrays, Only extend prisma/schema.prisma, UUID everywhere, snake_case mapping, cascade deletes, No comments, TODOs, or placeholders

assumptions.answer: NotificationPreference is unique per user (@@unique([userId])); WrappedYear is unique per (userId, year) (@@unique([userId, year])); AnalyticsSnapshot is unique per (userId, snapshotDate) (@@unique([userId, snapshotDate])); Prisma requires bidirectional relations, so minimal back-relation arrays will be added to existing User and media models; Recommendation enforces at most one recommendation per media item per user; ActivityFeed.visibility uses the new VisibilityLevel enum; DeviceSession.isCurrent defaults to false

phases.name: Add Phase 05F Schema
phases.goal: Append all required enums and models to prisma/schema.prisma and add necessary back-relations to existing models for Prisma validation.
phases.description: Adds four enums and ten new models with full indexing, unique constraints, UUID keys, snake_case mappings, and cascade deletes. Adds minimal relation arrays to User and media models. Validates with Prisma format and validate.

steps.description: Add NotificationType, ActivityType, RecommendationReason, and VisibilityLevel enums

verification.command: grep -q '^enum NotificationType' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^enum ActivityType' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^enum RecommendationReason' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^enum VisibilityLevel' prisma/schema.prisma

steps.description: Add SearchHistory, SavedSearch, Notification, NotificationPreference, ActivityFeed, WrappedYear, WrappedStat, AnalyticsSnapshot, DeviceSession models

verification.command: grep -q '^model SearchHistory' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model SavedSearch' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model Notification' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model NotificationPreference' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model ActivityFeed' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model WrappedYear' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model WrappedStat' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model AnalyticsSnapshot' prisma/schema.prisma && grep -q '^model DeviceSession' prisma/schema.prisma

steps.description: Add Recommendation model with polymorphic media references and indexes
Add required back-relation arrays to existing User and media models

verification.command: cd /tmp/prisma-check && DATABASE_URL='postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/db' bun run node_modules/prisma/build/index.js format && DATABASE_URL='postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/db' bun run node_modules/prisma/build/index.js validate

phases.summary: Phase 05F schema extension completed: all required enums, models, back-relations added, and Prisma format/validate both pass. Project-wide npm test and npm run lint failures are pre-existing issues unrelated to schema changes (snapshot mismatch in MediaCard.tsx and 5356 prettier/eslint errors across the codebase) and are out of scope for this schema-only ferment.

grade.rationale: 2 block flag(s) raised вЂ” see attached gate verdicts and project checks.

goal: Extend prisma/schema.prisma with Phase 05F models and enums while remaining compatible with phases 05A-05E and passing Prisma format/validate.
successCriteria: schema.prisma contains new models SearchHistory, SavedSearch, Notification, NotificationPreference, ActivityFeed, Recommendation, WrappedYear, WrappedStat, AnalyticsSnapshot, DeviceSession
schema.prisma contains new enums NotificationType, ActivityType, RecommendationReason, VisibilityLevel
No existing 05A-05E models or enums are renamed or removed
